description: Crafted from soft, genuine leather, this wallet from wac by wrangler is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. wac has elegantly combined classic techniques and innovative designs so you can carry your monetary essentials with ease in this classic wallet.Dimensions: 11 cm x 9 cmHas two main compartmentsEight card slots on either side of the walletTwo slip pockets on either sideStitch detailing and branding embossed on the inside flapCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
